description: Teaches your OpenClaw agent how to serve content to the OpenPot iOS client across all six tabs: Chat, Pulse, Calendar, Apps, Terminal, and Agents.

features.name: Chat
features.description: Core conversational interface via OpenClaw gateway WebSocket. Streaming responses, markdown rendering, voice input/output, message persistence.

features.name: Pulse Cards
features.description: Proactive notification cards delivered to the Pulse tab. Supports categories, priorities, expanded body with markdown, and action buttons.

features.name: Pulse Card Expansion
features.description: Tap-to-expand on Pulse cards. Cards with expanded_body show a detail sheet with rendered markdown and optional action buttons.

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Multi-source calendar integration with month and agenda views. Agent provides events via /api/calendar/events. Agent never modifies calendar without user permission.

features.name: Web Apps
features.description: Agent-generated web apps displayed in a categorized grid with bottom drawer navigation. Apps require a category field. Three creation types: self-contained HTML, HTML + backend service, Claude Code assisted.

features.name: Voice
features.description: Voice input via Apple Speech STT and voice output via ElevenLabs TTS. Per-agent voice ID, model, and speed configuration.

features.name: Skills Display
features.description: View and manage agent skills from OpenPot. Reads skill list via gateway WebSocket, displays installed and bundled skills with status and requirements.

features.name: SSH Terminal
features.description: In-app SSH terminal via SwiftTerm with ed25519 keypair authentication.

features.name: Settings
features.description: Agent settings and configuration accessible from the agent dock gear icon.
